summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the redesigned Logix Finance gov-style NBFC site. All 15 routes load with 200 status and zero console/page errors. The basic Indian government website aesthetic is fully implemented: Arial body font, blue (#0B3D91) headings, blue (#1A0DAB) underlined links, saffron (#ED6F12) active nav, tricolour strips (header + reverse on footer), emblem + Indian flag images, blue primary nav with white text, scrolling NOTICE marquee with 'Beware of fraudsters' + 879624245 + cms.rbi.org.in. Real verbatim policy text from POLICIES.docx verified on Interest Rate, Fair Practices, Privacy, and Grievance Redressal pages. Plain gov-tables render correctly with blue headers. 'xxxxxxxx' placeholders render with Courier mono / cream bg / yellow dashed border (intentional, per spec). Contact form: submit disabled until consent (verified), enabled after consent, success notice appears on submit. ScrollToTop works on route change (1452 -> 0). Sidebar on policy pages lists all 10 policies with the current one highlighted. Breadcrumb + Last Updated/Approved-by footer present.

issues: 'Disclosures' and 'Grievance Redressal' links in primary nav use plain <a href> instead of react-router <NavLink>. They navigate correctly but trigger a full page reload and never show the saffron active-state highlight when the user is on those pages (the 5 NavLink items do). Minor UX inconsistency - should be converted to NavLink.

data-testid attributes are present only on the 5 main Quick Links (footer-home, footer-about-us, etc.). The 10 policy/legal links and 5 regulator links have no data-testid - consider adding for test coverage parity.

Every route shares the same <title> 'Logix Finance & Investment | Simple, Transparent Lending' - already flagged in iteration_1 - not yet fixed. Each of the 15 routes should set a unique document.title for SEO/accessibility.

action_items: (Optional) Convert header 'Disclosures' and 'Grievance Redressal' anchors to NavLink so active-state highlighting + SPA navigation work consistently with the other 5 nav links.
(Optional) Set a unique document.title per route (especially for the 10 policy pages) using a small useEffect or react-helmet-async.
(Optional) Add data-testid to footer policy/legal/regulator links for parity with main Quick Links.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx uses <a href='/policies/...'> for 'Disclosures' and 'Grievance Redressal' (lines 95-106). This causes full page reload and skips the React Router SPA path. Should be <NavLink to='/policies/...'> for consistency and active state.

Header.jsx embeds external Wikimedia images for emblem/flag via hot link. For a production RBI submission the site should host its own copies (or use base64) to avoid availability/dependency on Wikimedia upload paths.
All pages share an identical <title> - already flagged in iteration_1 and still unaddressed.

Brand row text 'logixfinance&investment.com' uses literal '&' in display - this is the literal email user provided (per requirements). The HTML entity is correctly escaped in JSX (&). Verified rendering OK.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this build
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is purely static; Contact form is local-state only. Verified all 15 routes (200 OK, header/footer present, marquee visible, zero console errors). All content checks passed: IRP exact rates (0.10-1.00, 8-25, 12-15, 24-365), 1.25% per day, Rs.500 NACH, 3 days free look, 'Part pre-payment strictly not permitted'; FPC has all 11 numbered sections; Privacy Policy contains 'age of 13', cookies, log files, info@logixfinance, 879624245; Grievance Redressal contains 48 hours / 7 working days / 15 working days, 10:30-6:30, 879624245, grievance@logixfinance. Style tokens confirmed: body Arial, headings rgb(11,61,145), links rgb(26,13,171) underlined, active nav bg rgb(237,111,18). Sidebar on policy pages contains all 10 items with the current one highlighted. Breadcrumb + 'Last Updated' + 'Approved by' present. ScrollToTop confirmed (1452 -> 0). Contact form: submit disabled until consent (verified), success notice shows 'Thank you. Your enquiry has been received.' after submit. Placeholders use Courier New + #FFF3D6 bg + 1px dashed #C9A64A - intentional and matches spec.

test_results_detail.routes_loaded: 15/15 (200 OK, header+footer rendered, marquee present, no console errors)
test_results_detail.header_primary_nav: 5 NavLink items + 'Disclosures' + 'Grievance Redressal' anchors - all navigate correctly. Saffron active bg confirmed on NavLinks only.
test_results_detail.fonts_and_colors: Body Arial / Headings #0B3D91 / Links #1A0DAB underlined / Active nav #ED6F12 - all verified
test_results_detail.home_page: About intro box, Loan Products gov-table with 4 products (Pay Day, Business, LAP, EMI) showing exact rates 0.10-1.00, 8-25, 12-15, 24-365 - all confirmed
test_results_detail.about_page: Company Profile, Vision, Mission, Core Values, Board of Directors - all present
test_results_detail.contact_form: Submit disabled initially=true, disabled before consent=true, enabled after consent=true, success notice 'Thank you. Your enquiry has been received.' shown on submit; phone 879624245, grievance email present
test_results_detail.policy_pages_layout: page-title band + breadcrumb + sidebar (10 policies, current highlighted) + content box + Last Updated / Approved by footer - all confirmed
test_results_detail.interest_rate_policy_verbatim: Master Direction RBC 2025, 0.10-1.00, 8-25, 12-15, 24-365, 1.25% per day, Rs.500 NACH, 3 days free look, 'Part pre-payment strictly not permitted' - ALL verified
test_results_detail.privacy_policy_verbatim: age of 13, cookies, log files, info@logixfinance, 879624245 - all verified
test_results_detail.grievance_redressal_verbatim: 48 hours, 7 working days, 15 working days, 10:30 AM to 6:30 PM, 879624245, grievance@logixfinance - all verified
test_results_detail.placeholders: .ph elements render with Courier New monospace + cream bg (rgb(255,243,214)) + 1px dashed border rgb(201,166,74) - matches spec
test_results_detail.data_testids: All key interactive elements have data-testid (nav-*, footer-*, enquiry-*, site-header, site-footer, brand-logo-link, notice-marquee, top-skip, top-tools, primary-nav)
